allow: PowerShell($proc = Start-Process dotnet -ArgumentList "run","--","table","octave-sweep","--ratios","1.0","1.25","1.5","--only-full-matches","--only-centered-full-matches" -PassThru -Wait -NoNewWindow -RedirectStandardOutput "smoke3.txt" -RedirectStandardError "smoke3_err.txt"; "ExitCode: $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; $stars = \(Get-Content smoke3.txt | Select-String -Pattern "â˜…"\).Count; "star rows \(both flags\): $stars"; Get-Content smoke3.txt | Select-String -Pattern "swept" | Select-Object -Last 4)

PowerShell(dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~SuperpositionsTests" --nologo --logger "trx;LogFileName=res.trx" | Out-Null; if \(Test-Path "Melodroid.Tests/TestResults/res.trx"\) { $x = [xml]\(Get-Content "Melodroid.Tests/TestResults/res.trx"\); $x.TestRun.ResultSummary.outcome; $x.TestRun.ResultSummary.Counters.OuterXml } else { "no trx" })
